query:
SELECT 
  dataOrigin,
  deletedAt IS NOT NULL AS is_deleted,
  isArchived,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM projects
GROUP BY dataOrigin, is_deleted, isArchived
ORDER BY dataOrigin, is_deleted;
